title: Richly Flavored Russian Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful one-pot stew featuring tender lamb, rich almond essence, and a touch of salt-bake, all in a low-sodium friendly dish. This stew is perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large Dutch oven, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they are translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced carrots and cubed potatoes, cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the almond extract, salt, pepper, beef broth, and tomato paste, stir to combine.
Cover the Dutch oven and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 2.5 hours, or until the lamb is tender and the vegetables are cooked through.
Remove the stew from the oven and stir in the chopped parsley.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
